fields.name: headline
fields.label: Headline
fields.description: Optional headline text displayed over the background image

fields.name: backgroundImage
fields.label: Background Image
fields.description: Optional background image displayed behind the headline and content

fields.name: customerGroups
fields.label: Customer Group ID(s)
fields.description: Comma-separated Adobe Commerce customer group IDs (e.g. 1, 2)

fields.name: fragment
fields.label: Fragment Path
fields.description: Path to the content fragment shown to matched users (e.g. /fragments/member-offer)
